title: panicum camporum
intro: Panicum camporum, also known as Switch Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Panicum genus and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Panicum camporum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Panicum camporum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be dried and used in smudging ceremonies for its purifying properties.
